description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a robust, angular design, featuring a matte black finish on the barrel and stock. The shotgun has a prominent cylindrical suppressor or extended barrel shroud at the muzzle, giving it a tactical appearance. The receiver and action are constructed from a metallic material, with visible seams and a squared-off profile. The grip and fore-end are ergonomically shaped, likely made from a polymer or composite material, and are colored in a contrasting brownish-orange tone. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall build suggests a weapon designed for urban tactical use, with a focus on durability and ease of handling.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a matte black barrel, angular receiver, and brown ergonomic grips, featuring a large suppressor or barrel shroud.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the black suppressor, angular receiver, and brown grip and fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with both grips visible on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, the extended suppressor, and the ergonomic grip and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with the brown grip and fore-end visible on each side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a large cylindrical suppressor or shroud; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
